message:
fix(ci): add portable feature set for release builds without ONNX/AVX2

Release binaries linked against ONNX Runtime static libs (via
fastembed → ort → ort-sys) that contain AVX2 instructions, causing
SIGILL on CPUs without AVX2 (e.g., Proxmox VMs with kvm64 CPU type).

Add a `portable` feature set that includes s3fifo + tantivy-engine
but excludes hybrid/fastembed/ONNX. Release CI now builds with
--no-default-features --features portable. Default local builds
unchanged (still include hybrid for development).

Feature forwarding chain ensures Cargo feature unification can't
re-enable hybrid through transitive paths.

Closes #79 (stale binary confounder resolved by cleaner release builds)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,8 +94,12 @@ jobs:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - name: Build release binaries
+        # --no-default-features --features portable: exclude hybrid/fastembed
+        # (ONNX Runtime ships AVX2-only static libs → SIGILL on older x86 CPUs).
+        # Portable keeps s3fifo + tantivy-engine; hybrid can still be enabled
+        # by users who build from source with default features.
         run: |
-          cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }} -p mcp-agent-mail -p mcp-agent-mail-cli
+          cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }} -p mcp-agent-mail -p mcp-agent-mail-cli --no-default-features --features portable
 
       - name: Create tarball (Unix)
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'

@@ -58,6 +58,9 @@ libsqlite3-sys = { workspace = true, features = ["bundled-windows"] }
 
 [features]
 default = ["hybrid", "s3fifo", "tantivy-engine"]
+# Portable build: everything except hybrid/fastembed (avoids ONNX Runtime AVX2 SIGILL
+# on machines without AVX2).  Used by CI release builds.
+portable = ["s3fifo", "tantivy-engine"]
 # Enable Tantivy-based lexical search (moved from search-core)
 tantivy-engine = []
 # Enable hybrid search (lexical + semantic + frankensearch)

@@ -21,9 +21,13 @@ ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
 zip.workspace = true
 include_dir.workspace = true
 atty.workspace = true
-mcp-agent-mail-db = { workspace = true }
+mcp-agent-mail-db = { workspace = true, default-features = false }
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
 sqlmodel-sqlite.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/default"]
+portable = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/portable"]
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile.workspace = true

@@ -24,9 +24,13 @@ base64 = "0.22"
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-core" }
-mcp-agent-mail-db = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-db" }
+mcp-agent-mail-db = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-db", default-features = false }
 fastmcp-core.workspace = true
 mime_guess = "2.0"
 
+[features]
+default = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/default"]
+portable = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/portable"]
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
